title: Enhanced Foxes x Fresh Animations
description: Makes Enhanced Foxes compatible with Fresh Animations
body:
![Fox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da60a264fcef51ac07d4821ba7f0531a4104ec81.jpeg)**This resource pack adds compatibility for [Enhanced Foxes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-foxes) with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations).**
### Requirements
This resource pack requires [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures).

**Also, you need to put the resource packs in the correct order.**

Put Enhanced Foxes x Fresh Animations above Fresh Animations

![Enhanced Foxes x Fresh Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18acd4d0a84534e54dbc863974ac17b8eb3d4002.png)
